instruction: In System Settings under Trackpad, turn natural scrolling {STATE}.

args: defaults write -g com.apple.swipescrolldirection -bool {BASELINE}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
if [ {STATE} = on ]; then defaults write -g com.apple.swipescrolldirection -bool true; else defaults write -g com.apple.swipescrolldirection -bool false; fi; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
